[@microsoft/fast-element/hydration.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [deferHydrationAttribute](../fast-element.deferhydrationattribute/index.html)

## deferHydrationAttribute variable

> This API is provided as a beta preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.
>

The attribute used to defer hydration of an element. Retained for intersection observer viewport hydration rendering.

**Signature:**

```typescript
deferHydrationAttribute = "defer-hydration"
```
